summary: Iteration 3 - Full testing completed for Telegram REAL delivery, MongoDB persistence, and all core features. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with Telegram showing '已连接' (connected) status and real message delivery confirmed.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - returns healthy status with telegram_configured=true
GET /api/prices/AUD_USD - returns valid price data with indicators
GET /api/prices/NZD_USD - returns valid price data
GET /api/signals/current - returns signals for both pairs
GET /api/events - returns economic calendar events
GET /api/risk/status - returns risk control status
GET /api/telegram/status - shows configured=true, bot_token_set=true, chat_id_set=true
POST /api/telegram/test - REAL Telegram delivery SUCCESS (message received in Telegram app)
POST /api/telegram/send-signal-alert - REAL signal alert sent to Telegram SUCCESS
POST /api/telegram/config - saves config to MongoDB and reflects in status
GET /api/telegram/history - returns alert history from MongoDB
PUT /api/settings/kill_switch - persists to MongoDB and verified via GET /api/settings
GET /api/backtest/stats - returns 50 trades as expected
GET /api/backtest/results - returns 50 backtest results with correct structure
GET /api/backtest/chart-data - returns chart data for visualization
GET /api/risk/capital-protection - returns capital protection metrics
GET /api/risk/config - returns stop loss levels and daily limits
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all panels (prices, signals, events, risk, settings, telegram, backtest)
Frontend: Telegram panel shows 'Telegram 已连接' with green checkmarks
Frontend: Save Config button clickable and functional
Frontend: Send Test Message button sends real Telegram message
Frontend: Kill Switch toggle works correctly
Frontend: Direction selects functional
Frontend: Chinese Mandarin UI displays correctly throughout
context_for_next_testing_agent: Telegram is FULLY WORKING with real message delivery. MongoDB migration completed. All core features tested and working: prices, signals, events, risk control, settings, backtest, Telegram alerts. Bot token and chat ID are configured in backend/.env and persisted to MongoDB. Market price data is SIMULATED (no real Twelve Data API key).

mocked_apis_list: Market price data (simulated - no real Twelve Data API key)
